data.description: Virtuix sends Omni One to U.S. Marine Corps for training.

data.title: Singular Genomics Launches G4X™ Spatial Research Challenge with Award of Spatial Multiomics Study up to 1,000-Samples
data.description: Singular Genomics has introduced the G4X™ Spatial program, a flagship challenge offering funding for an in situ multiomic study on G4X with the potential to analyze up to 1,000 samples. This initiative aims to facilitate larger cohort-based spatial research in oncology and translational science. The news was shared in San Diego on March 26, 2026.

data.title: Development capital secured for the Vyterra Renewables clean fuel facility in Enfield, Nova Scotia
data.description: Vyterra Renewables Nova Scotia Ltd. has successfully obtained $3.8 million in non-dilutive funding to finalize the remaining engineering, design, and permitting tasks for its RTP® project in Enfield, Nova Scotia.

data.title: Auxly Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: On March 26, 2026, a prominent consumer packaged goods company in the cannabis products market, Auxly Cannabis Group Inc. (TSX: XLY) (OTCQB: CBWTF), disclosed its financial outcomes for the periods ending December 31, 2025. The report covered a span of three months as well as twelve months.

data.title: Sypris Reports Fourth Quarter Results
data.description: Louisville-based Sypris Solutions, Inc. (Nasdaq/GM: SYPR) released its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full-year ending December 31, 2025. Notably, there was a 27.6% surge in fourth-quarter revenue in Sypris Electronics. However, this rise could not counterbalance the immediate effects of tariffs and regulatory uncertainties on demand from specific transportation clients of Sypris Technologies. Consequently, there was a minor decline in the Company's overall revenue for the year.

data.title: Jacobs secures role in one of Wisconsin’s largest interstate modernization programs
data.description: In Dallas, Jacobs (NYSE: J) has secured contracts from the Wisconsin Department of Transportation (WisDOT) to enhance the I-39/90/94 corridor. This significant project aims to modernize and expand the corridor, a crucial route in the state. The program includes reconstructing and widening key sections to enhance safety, alleviate congestion, and bolster lasting economic development. Dating back to the 1960s, this corridor plays a vital role in connecting commuters and freight. The award of multiple design contracts underscores Jacobs' involvement in this essential infrastructure initiative.

data.title: Volatus Aerospace Announces Strategic Collaboration with Sentinel R&D to Support Canadian Sovereign UAV Capability
data.description: Volatus Aerospace has announced a significant partnership with Sentinel R&D to bolster the Canadian sovereign UAV capability. This collaboration aims to enhance drone technology and strengthen the nation's defense capabilities. The partnership is expected to bring together expertise from both companies to achieve this goal. This strategic move is pivotal as it aims to support the growing demand for UAV technologies in Canada. This collaboration highlights the importance of innovation and collaboration in the aerospace industry, especially considering that the UAV market is projected to reach $XX billion by 2025.

data.title: ChinaAMC celebrates the power of AI by launching major events
data.description: A prominent player in China's asset management sector has a significant connection with artificial intelligence dating back to 2017, when it established a collaboration with Microsoft Research Asia. Recently, on March 26, 2026, China Asset Management Co. (ChinaAMC) wrapped up a set of notable activities.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Theo Ai/
data.description: Theo Ai has strengthened its council leadership by adding prominent legal figures and establishing the inaugural Mass Tort Defense Advisory Board. The news was announced on March 25, 2026, in a press release by Theo Ai via PR Newswire. A company representative disclosed that a statement from Patrick Fang was included.

data.title: Firefly Confirms Public-Private Partnership with the Department of War
data.description: A new AI-powered EEG/ERP technology by Firefly has received FDA clearance for deployment in assisting the evaluation and treatment of PTSD and TBI in U.S. service members. This advanced technology aims to provide critical support for around 1.3 million service members who may be affected by these conditions. The FDA approval signifies a significant step towards enhancing the management of PTSD and TBI among military personnel.

data.title: Natural Grocers® Hosts Virtual Hiring Event for Nutritional Health Coaches Nationwide
data.description: On April 1, 2026, Natural Grocers®, a leading family-owned organic and natural grocery retailer, will conduct a virtual hiring event in LAKEWOOD, Colo. This event will provide interested candidates with the opportunity to interact with hiring managers and company experts. Attendees can engage directly with the recruitment team to learn more about available positions. The company's commitment to organic and natural products has made it a top choice for consumers. Mark your calendars and join the event to explore potential career opportunities with a renowned grocery retailer.
Spectral Medical Announces Fourth Quarter and Fiscal 2025 Results and Provides Corporate Update

data.title: MessageGears Delivers Warehouse-Native Revenue Tracking for Enterprise Marketers With New Cross-Channel Conversion Analytics
data.description: Today, in Atlanta, MessageGears introduced conversion reporting - a new set of features that connects campaign performance and revenue analytics to data warehouse insights for enterprise brands. This launch eliminates the need for additional tools in the stack. The warehouse-native architecture provided by MessageGears revolutionizes attribution possibilities, offering a seamless integration of campaign performance and revenue analytics. This announcement underscores the company's commitment to enhancing data activation and engagement for enterprise brands.

data.title: SAGA Metals Acquires Strategic Titanium Assets from Rio Tinto in Quebec
data.description: The Garneau Titanium Project has discovered a boulder rich in ilmenite, with grab-sample assays showing 65.1% Fe₂O₃, 32.4% TiO₂, and 2,260 ppm Vanadium.

data.title: Plus Therapeutics Appoints Diagnostics and Molecular Diagnostics Industry Leader Ron Andrews to its Board of Directors
data.description: Healthcare company Plus Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: PSTV) based in Houston revealed the addition of Ron Andrews, a diagnostics industry veteran, to its Board of Directors. Plus focuses on developing and selling precision diagnostics and radiopharmaceuticals catering to central nervous system (CNS) cancers. The appointment is expected to bring valuable expertise to the company's operations and future growth in this sector.

data.title: Bitcoin Breaks Below $70,000 As Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Drop 5%
data.description: Amid caution among traders, Bitcoin dropped below $70,000 on Thursday morning due to a substantial $14.1 billion options expiry, as per Deribit data. The total crypto options expiring today amount to a staggering $18.6 billion, with Bitcoin accounting for over $14.1 billion. On Wednesday, Bitcoin ETFs experienced net inflows of $7.81 million, while Ethereum ETFs saw net outflows of $8.51 million. Current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin at $69,215, Ethereum at $2,067, Solana at $87.66, and XRP at $1.37. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: REX American Resources Reports Record High Full Fiscal Year 2025 Net Income Per Share Attributable to REX Common Shareholders of $2.50
data.description: In Dayton, Ohio, REX American Resources Corporation (NYSE: REX), a prominent ethanol production company, released its financial and operational outcomes for the full year and fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025. The results for REX American Resources Corporation in 2025 are mainly influenced by its ownership in six ethanol production plants. Noteworthy facilities include One Earth Energy, LLC, and NuGen Energy, LLC.

data.title: BTC down 44% from $126,000 ATH, in late stage of bear market: Onchain, technical indicators show.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has dropped by 44% from its peak of $126,000, indicating a shift to the latter stages of the bear market. This decline is in line with significant onchain and technical indicators.

data.title: California judge certifies investor class in Nvidia suit over alleged misstatements on crypto mining GPU sales, advancing case toward trial.
data.description: A judge in California recently approved the certification of an investor class in the Nvidia securities lawsuit. The lawsuit pertains to claims of misleading information regarding sales of GPUs for crypto mining. This development moves the case closer to a potential trial, marking a significant step forward. The class certification allows a group of investors to collectively pursue legal action against Nvidia. This decision could have significant implications for the company, as it signals progress in the legal proceedings. The number of investors included in the class and the total value of securities involved in the suit are yet to be disclosed.

data.title: European regulators probe Snapchat for weak age verification system, leading kids to inappropriate content. #ChildSafety #Brussels
data.description: Brussels regulators have accused a popular social media platform of having an ineffective age-verification system and directing underage users towards unsuitable content and experiences.
